name: Noodle Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Ready-to-serve low sodium Chicken Broth
1 1/2 oz Uncooked medium or thin egg
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart microwave casserole, combine shredded carrot, chopped onion, and sliced celery with margarine.
2. Cover and microwave on HIGH for 1 minute.
3. Add the chicken broth and stir in the noodles.
4. Cover and microwave on Medium (50%) for 3 minutes, stirring every minute.
5. Let stand for 2 minutes until the noodles are softened.
Per serving: 1 Fat, 1 Vegetable, 1 Bread, 20 Optional Calories
151 Calories, 6g Fat
